# mtncloud_service_plan (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud service plan by name/code for a group and instance type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_service_plan" "small" {
  name  = "G2S4"
  group = "MTNNG_CLOUD_AZ_1"
  type  = "MTN-CS10"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) Name of the group the plan is available in.
- `name` (String) Name of the service plan to look up (e.g. `G2S4`).
- `type` (String) Instance type code the plan applies to (e.g. `MTN-CS10`).

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) Code of the service plan.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the service plan.
- `max_cpu` (Number) Maximum number of vCPUs the plan provides.
- `max_memory` (Number) Maximum memory the plan provides, in bytes.
- `max_storage` (Number) Maximum storage the plan provides, in bytes.
